observations.note: All 12 integration tests passed on first run. The PhaseState record_step() and validate_phase_steps() methods integrate cleanly with the CLI command via shared tmp_path isolation.
Anti-gaming validation PASSED: no skip decorators, no empty tests, no TODO/FIXME placeholders found in test suite.
The _setup_project helper isolates tmp_path into a mini project root with devforgeai/workflows and .claude/hooks directories, making each test self-contained and side-effect free.
Error propagation scenario confirmed: missing registry causes CLI to return exit code 1 and validate_phase_steps raises FileNotFoundError. Malformed JSON also returns exit code 1.

scenarios_covered: Full CLI flow: phase_record_step_command -> state file update -> validate_phase_steps PASS
Registry + Validation integration: write registry -> record steps -> validate passes
Error propagation: missing registry -> CLI returns 1
Idempotency across CLI and direct API calls
